commands.review_summary:
The PR changes image, video, and music generation so run-scoped cron sessions execute media generation inline while non-run cron and interactive sessions still use detached background completions.

PR surface: Source +15, Tests +80. Total +95 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current `main` passes run-scoped cron keys into media tools, and the media tools detach for any non-empty session key. I did not run the live cron/provider reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR is already a narrow implementation, but the protected `maintainer` label and mock-only real behavior proof make the next step maintainer review/verification rather than automated repair.

target.title: fix(agents): keep cron media generation inline
target.body:
## Summary

- Keep run-scoped cron media generation inline instead of detaching it to the background completion path.
- Centralize the detach policy for image, video, and music generation so interactive sessions still get async media completions.
- Add regression coverage for cron run-scoped `image_generate` staying inline and for the shared detach policy.

Fixes #88001.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/media-generate-background-shared.test.ts src/agents/tools/image-generate-tool.test.ts` (rebased head; 58 tests passed)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/video-generate-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/music-generate-tool.test.ts` (52 tests passed)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/media-generate-background-shared.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-trajectory-status.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent.session-identity.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.message-tool-policy.test.ts` (277 tests passed across 3 shards)
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` (clean; no accepted/actionable findings)

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: isolated cron `agentTurn` runs that call `image_generate` no longer return an async-started tool result and finish before the generated media callback can resume the workflow.

Real environment tested: focused mocked provider/runtime coverage in the local OpenClaw checkout on Node/Vitest.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/media-generate-background-shared.test.ts src/agents/tools/image-generate-tool.test.ts` on the rebased head.

Evidence after fix: the new cron run-scoped image test calls the image provider immediately, schedules no background work, does not fire the async-start callback, and completes the task ledger inline for `agent:main:cron:daily-media:run:run-123`.

Observed result after fix: run-scoped cron media generation returns the generated media in the tool result, so the same cron agent turn can continue to the next workflow step.

What was not tested: a live provider cron job with real generated media delivery; coverage here uses the existing provider/task/session mocks plus the issue's requested cron/subagent regression bundle.
target.author: steipete
